summary: Completed Phase 4 testing: Fascicolo CE generation. Backend: 12/12 tests PASSED (auth protection, PDF generation with various configs, ZIP generation with PDF+JSON, norm not found handling, company settings integration, different product types - finestra/cancello). Frontend: All UI components verified - Step 5 'Genera Fascicolo' card appears after calculation, dialog opens with description input, PDF/ZIP download buttons, content list (DOP, Etichetta CE, Manuale). Both PDF and ZIP downloads work correctly.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

backend_pdf_generation.basic_pdf_generation: PASS - Returns valid PDF (>5KB, correct headers, PDF magic bytes)
backend_pdf_generation.pdf_recalculates_without_results: PASS - Re-calculates when calc_results not provided
backend_pdf_generation.pdf_for_cancello: PASS - Generates fascicolo for EN_13241 (gate-specific maintenance)

backend_zip_generation.zip_contains_pdf_and_json: PASS - ZIP has 2 files: fascicolo_CE.pdf + data.json
backend_zip_generation.json_has_required_fields: PASS - declaration_number, norma, manufacturer, product, calculation_results

backend_company_settings.uses_company_settings: PASS - Reads manufacturer info from company_settings collection

backend_norm_specific_maintenance.finestra_maintenance: PASS - Includes guarnizioni, drenaggio maintenance items
backend_norm_specific_maintenance.cancello_maintenance: PASS - Includes fotocellule, sicurezza, bilanciamento molle items

frontend_fascicolo_card.appears_after_calculation: PASS - Step 5 'Genera Fascicolo CE' card shows after running calculation
frontend_fascicolo_card.description_text: PASS - Shows 'DOP + Etichetta CE + Manuale d'Uso e Manutenzione'

frontend_fascicolo_dialog.opens_on_click: PASS - Dialog opens when clicking 'Genera Fascicolo' button
frontend_fascicolo_dialog.content_list: PASS - Shows numbered list: 1. DOP, 2. Etichetta CE, 3. Manuale d'Uso

action_items: Minor: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent for accessibility (console warning)
critical_code_review_comments: Fascicolo generator correctly reads NormaConfig JSON to populate DOP dynamically
required_performances from JSON become rows in declared performances table
CE Label correctly shows mandatory performances only
User Manual is norm-specific (different maintenance for cancello vs finestra)
PDF generation uses reportlab with proper styling (A4, tables, CE mark)
ZIP contains both machine-readable JSON and human-readable PDF
Re-calculation logic works when calc_results not provided
All data-testids in place for automated testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from iteration_35 (3 norms, 21 components)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Fascicolo generation fully tested. Endpoint: POST /api/engine/generate-fascicolo. Request body includes norma_id, product_type, dimensions, components, specs, optional calc_results, output (pdf/zip). PDF contains 3 pages: DOP (with Uw calculation detail, zone compliance table), CE Label (mandatory performances), User Manual (norm-specific maintenance). ZIP contains PDF + JSON data. Frontend: Step 5 card appears after calculation, dialog has description input and two download buttons. All data-testids documented in features_verified.
